context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses 'npm run dry-run' (not 'npm run sync') when asked for a preview mode, and navigates to the correct project directory. Also checks that the agent understands the dry-run does not make changes.

checklist.name: Dry-run command used
checklist.description: preview.sh uses 'npm run dry-run' — NOT 'npm run sync', 'npm run preview', or any other command variant

checklist.name: cd before command
checklist.description: preview.sh changes directory into the project path before or as part of running the npm command

checklist.name: No-changes explanation
checklist.description: preview-guide.md or a comment in preview.sh explicitly states that this mode makes NO changes to Reclaim (it is a preview only)

checklist.name: Distinction from sync
checklist.description: preview-guide.md explains how the preview mode differs from the full sync (e.g., non-destructive, view only, no entries deleted or created)
